notes: Project restore: recompute the per-frame layer-activity counters (_recountLayerActivity) after a project ZIP is restored — they were left at the previous scene's values, so animate() could keep running splat-sort work for a splat that no longer exists (or skip it). NOTE on the reported ZIP-save issues (two splat files / lost object transform): these could NOT be reproduced in the current code — save emits exactly ONE splat file (the _rawBuffer / _streamUrl branches are mutually exclusive; streaming RAD fetches one full-res file) and object pos/rot/scale + figure pose round-trip correctly through save→restore (restore applies the root transform last via applyLayerTransform). If you still see them, you are most likely on a cached older build — hard-reload to 0.0.26 and retry. Builds on v0.0.25.
